source_description: 003-reactive-integration: Track FeeConcentrationIndex on non-V4 pools via reactive smart contracts. PoolKeyExtLib maps PoolKey to IUniswapV3Pool and inverse. Hook wrapper pattern wraps V4 IHooks interface for consistency. Portable across Reactive Network and Somnia L1. Events monitored: Swap, Mint, Burn on V3 pools. Reactive contract subscribes to these events and triggers callbacks that flow through the same FCI hook pipeline as native V4 events.
